subject: refactor(pwa): extract shared Browser type, constants, and display names
body:
Eliminates three duplicated browser lists across pwa.ts, usePWAInstall,
and DebugBanner by exporting CHROMIUM_BROWSERS constant and Browser union
type. Moves browserNames to module-level BROWSER_DISPLAY_NAMES. Adds
JSDoc noting Arc UA detection is best-effort and Safari check ordering
dependency.

Tags: pwa, types, refactor, browser-detection
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-brave-mobile
Semver: patch
